---
name: Skill request
about: Suggest a new skill for OmniCode
title: '[SKILL] '
labels: enhancement, skill
assignees: ''

---

**Skill Name**
What is the name of the skill? (e.g., PostgreSQL Optimizer, React Native Expert)

**Description**
Provide a brief description of what this skill should do and how it should help.

**Category**
What category does this skill fall into? (e.g., Backend, Frontend, DevOps, etc.)

**Example Use Case**
Describe a scenario where this skill would be useful.

**Additional Context**
Add any other information or requirements for the skill here.
